offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We monitor accounts payable aging reports instead of manual tracking of payment deadlines.
problem: Late payments causing cash flow gaps
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
